# PERF-76 negative: CreateInBatches replaces the per-row insert
lang: go
file: PERF-076-safe.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Name string
}

func BulkInsert(db *gorm.DB, names []string) error {
	users := make([]User, 0, len(names))
	for _, n := range names {
		users = append(users, User{Name: n})
	}
	return db.CreateInBatches(users, 100).Error
}
